title: Best-selling video game of all time
description: Minecraft is the best-selling video game in history, with sales surpassing 300 million copies across all platforms.

title: Highest-grossing entertainment product
description: GTA V is among the most financially successful entertainment products ever, having sold over 190 million copies.

title: Best-selling single platform game (paid)
description: Across its many versions, Tetris has sold hundreds of millions of copies, making it one of the most successful franchises ever.

title: Best-selling home console of all time
description: The PlayStation 2 holds the record for the best-selling home video game console in history.

title: Fastest any% completion of Super Mario Bros.
description: World-class runners complete the 1985 classic in under five minutes using frame-perfect movement and wall-clip exploits.

title: Largest esports tournament prize pool
description: Dota 2's The International 2021 featured a crowdfunded prize pool exceeding $40 million, the largest in esports history.

title: Highest individual esports earnings
description: The two-time International champion is among the highest-earning competitive players in esports history.

title: Longest video game marathon
description: Endurance gamers have set Guinness World Records for marathon sessions exceeding five days of continuous play.

title: Best-selling console-exclusive game
description: Bundled with most Wii consoles, Wii Sports became one of the best-selling games of all time.

title: Best-selling racing game
description: Mario Kart 8 Deluxe is the best-selling racing game of all time and the top-selling Switch title.
